ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data record */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data collection */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of data collection */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of data collection */,
  "north_a" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles coming from the North */,
  "south_a" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles coming from the South */,
  "west_a" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles coming from the West */,
  "east_a" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles coming from the East */,
  "average_speed_north" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles coming from the North */,
  "average_speed_south" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles coming from the South */,
  "average_speed_west" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles coming from the West */,
  "average_speed_east" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles coming from the East */,
  "congestion_level" TEXT /* Congestion level based on traffic data */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the intersection where data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intersections" (
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intersection */,
  "intersection_name" TEXT /* Name of the intersection */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the intersection */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the intersection */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the intersection */,
  "number_of_lanes" INTEGER /* Number of lanes at the intersection */,
  "has_traffic_lights" INTEGER /* Indicates if the intersection has traffic lights */,
  "has_pedestrian_crossing" INTEGER /* Indicates if the intersection has pedestrian crossings */,
  "has_roundabout" INTEGER /* Indicates if the intersection has a roundabout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time interval */,
  "time_in_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the time interval in seconds */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time interval (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the time interval */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the time interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traffic analyst, city planner, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic data record being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES traffic_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, published) */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection the report is based on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_reports_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_light_timings" (
  "timing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for timing settings */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection for which timings apply */,
  "green_light_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the green light in seconds */,
  "red_light_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the red light in seconds */,
  "yellow_light_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the yellow light in seconds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the traffic light timings were updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the traffic light settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_light_timings_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)
